title: Dr. Brown’s Natural Flow Level 2 Wide-Neck Baby Bottle Silicone Teat, Medium Flow, 3m+, 100% Silicone Bottle Teat, 2-Pack
features: WIDE-NECK TEAT FOR GROWING BABY. Dr. Brown’s Medium Flow Teat is the next step for growing babies

CONSISTENT FLOW RATE. Vacuum-free feeding is closest to breastfeeding and Dr. Brown’s Medium Flow Teats provide a consistent flow so babies can feed at their own pace. Each teat level provides clinical consistency within the flow rate, so baby’s feeding experience is constant and comfortable
BREASTFEEDING SILICONE TEAT. The breast-like teat shape encourages a proper latch for a more natural bottle feeding experience and eases the transition from breast to bottle and back again
PRESERVES NUTRIENTS. The Level 2 teat and Anti-Colic vent system is proven to help preserve bottle milk nutrients and aid in digestion for a better night’s sleep
SOFT 100% SILICONE. Silicone teat fits all Dr. Brown’s Options+ wide-neck bottles
description: Product Description Dr. Brown’s Natural Flow Level 2 Teat is the next step for babies 3 months+. Dr. Brown’s Level 2 Teat, together with the Anti-Colic internal vent system, is clinically proven to reduce colic. Dr. Brown’s bottle and teat provide a more comfortable feeding experience for baby by decreasing spit-up, burping and wind. This vacuum-free feeding is closest to breastfeeding and Dr. Brown’s Medium Flow Teats provide a consistent flow so baby can feed at their own pace. The breast-like teat shape encourages a proper latch for a more natural bottle feeding experience and eases the transition from breast to bottle and back again. The Level 2 Teat and Anti-Colic vent system is proven to help preserve bottle milk nutrients and aid in digestion for a better night’s sleep. Made of super-soft, 100% silicone, the Level 2 Teat fits all Dr. Brown’s Options+ wide-neck bottles. The suggested age range for the Level 2 Teat is 3 months+, but baby’s preferred flow rate may vary. Safe for use in dishwasher (top rack only), electric and microwave sterilisers or boiling water. BPA free. Box Contains 2 x Level 2 Teats
